dialogue.line: and now, because Larry's home catching up on his sex, Jon Stewart.

dialogue.speaker: Hank
dialogue.line: I just feel like A wet burlap bag Full of monkey shit.

jokes.text: Well, that came across.

dialogue.line: Well, that came across.

jokes.text: You know, that's How you get the flu. You could wear Rubber gloves. That's true, And then I could, uh, Check their prostates, too.

dialogue.line: You know, that's How you get the flu. You could wear Rubber gloves.

dialogue.speaker: Larry
dialogue.line: That's true, And then I could, uh, Check their prostates, too.

dialogue.speaker: Network Executive
dialogue.line: We'd get more Of er's audience.

jokes.text: Why are you fucking With me like this? 'Hey now' is My catch phrase. I own it.

jokes.punchline: Hank's delusional ownership claim over a common phrase
jokes.explanation: Pure Hank delusion - his belief that he owns a common phrase shows his narcissistic self-importance perfectly.

dialogue.speaker: Hank
dialogue.line: Why are you fucking With me like this? 'Hey now' is My catch phrase. I own it.

jokes.punchline: Absurdly specific fake statistic delivered deadpan
jokes.explanation: Great satire of network research - the specificity of the fake stat makes it funnier.

jokes.text: And, like the limited Mcrib sandwich-- Scrumptious, hot, And hard to get.
jokes.setup: Describing Winona Ryder's appeal

dialogue.speaker: Network Executive
dialogue.line: And, like the limited Mcrib sandwich-- Scrumptious, hot, And hard to get.

jokes.text: This is like A wet dream come true. Well, that's why We have the tarp.

jokes.text: I'm not funny Or interesting, So I hope that's not Going to be a problem. Well, that Hasn't stopped Hank.

dialogue.line: Well, that Hasn't stopped Hank.

dialogue.line: Ah, you're so fucking great. I love it.

dialogue.speaker: Hank

dialogue.speaker: Paul Fisher
dialogue.line: Not in valencia, my friend.

jokes.text: You don't have to run. What if you just walk Through the audience? You walk. It doesn't Have to look like A fucking telethon.
